'''dathodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:poast|poast]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-th-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poast|poast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dathodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæthedheth|dæthedheth]] || [[word:dæthedhej|dæthedhej]] || [[word:dæthedhesh|dæthedhesh]] || [[word:dæthedhe|dæthedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dathothodhoth|dathothodhoth]] || [[word:dathothodhoj|dathothodhoj]] || [[word:dathothodhosh|dathothodhosh]] || [[word:dathothodho|dathothodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dathodhoth|dathodhoth]] || [[word:dathodhoj|dathodhoj]] || [[word:dathodhosh|dathodhosh]] || [[word:dathodho|dathodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dathofdhoth|dathofdhoth]] || [[word:dathofdhoj|dathofdhoj]] || [[word:dathofdhosh|dathofdhosh]] || [[word:dathofdhof|dathofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dathodhotho|dathodhotho]] || [[word:dathodhojo|dathodhojo]] || [[word:dathodhosho|dathodhosho]] || [[word:dathodhoko|dathodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dathodhoth|dathodhoth]] || [[word:dathodhoj|dathodhoj]] || [[word:dathodhosh|dathodhosh]] || [[word:dathodho|dathodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dathodhothol|dathodhothol]] || [[word:dathodhojol|dathodhojol]] || [[word:dathodhoshol|dathodhoshol]] || [[word:dathodhokol|dathodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dathodhothotho|dathodhothotho]] || [[word:dathodhojojo|dathodhojojo]] || [[word:dathodhoshosho|dathodhoshosho]] || [[word:dathodhoko|dathodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dathodhothon|dathodhothon]] || [[word:dathodhojon|dathodhojon]] || [[word:dathodhoshon|dathodhoshon]] || [[word:dathodhokon|dathodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dathodhothoro|dathodhothoro]] || [[word:dathodhojoro|dathodhojoro]] || [[word:dathodhoshoro|dathodhoshoro]] || [[word:dathodhokoro|dathodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
